title: ehretia cortesia
intro: Ehretia cortesia, also known as the 'Prairie Rose' or 'Sea Rose', is a flowering plant species native to Australia and Southeast Asia, characterized by its fragrant pink, white, or purple flowers. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves and flowers, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Ehretia cortesia include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin conditions, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Ehretia cortesia is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and ointments, making it a valuable resource in natural remedies and traditional healing practices.
